title: ageratina viburnoides
intro: Ageratina viburnoides, also known as Mexican Coffee, is a flowering plant in the mint family that is native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antispasmodic and antiseptic. The health benefits of Ageratina viburnoides include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and diarrhea, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce anxiety. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal properties, and its leaves can also be used in herbal infusions and salves.
